compiled_state.title: Exclude ESCALATE_REVIEW from resolution agent output in review-fix-dispatch.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Update plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/review-fix-dispatch.md:
Add explicit instruction: 'Resolution sub-agents must NOT emit escalate_review. The ESCALATE_REVIEW signal is reserved for reviewer agents only. If you include escalate_review in your output, it will be ignored by the orchestrator.'

This prevents resolution agents from attempting to re-escalate during the fix/defend loop.

Unit test exemption: Prompt file with no conditional logic.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/review-fix-dispatch.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Resolution exclusion documented
  Verify: grep -qi 'resolution.*must not.*escalate_review\|escalate_review.*reserved.*reviewer' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/review-fix-dispatch.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Verification passed — grep acceptance criteria confirmed ✓
comments.author: Test
